title: GeofencingZone
description: A virtual geographic boundary used to define operational areas, speed limits, parking rules, or restrictions for shared mobility services.

featureType.description: Type of geofencing zone feature (e.g. parking, restricted, slow)

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry defining the zone boundary

rideAllowed.description: Whether riding is permitted within this zone

rideThroughAllowed.description: Whether riding through without stopping is permitted

stationParking.description: Whether docking at a station is required to end a trip here

gps.description: GPS coordinates as a latitude,longitude string

geojson.description: GeoJSON geometry object representing this location
